name: Chocolate Mexicana
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk and grated chocolate into an earthenware pot.
2. Cook over low heat until the chocolate has melted.
3. Stir constantly to prevent sticking to the pan.
4. When the mixture comes to a boil, reduce the heat.
5. Vigorously beat with a molinillo until thick foam forms on top.
6. Serve hot in earthenware mugs.
Yield: 8 servings
